name: Yohimbine
summary: Yohimbine is tracked for Alpha-2 adrenergic receptor antagonist increasing sympathetic activity and norepinephrine release with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.

safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
